overall.description: A flight simulator scene showing a first-person perspective taxiing along airport taxiways and runways. The camera moves from a green painted taxiway onto the main asphalt runway, passing signage and approaching terminal buildings with a distant city skyline and mountains visible under partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport taxiway with green painted surface

agents.ego_description: taxiing steadily along the green painted taxiway toward the terminal complex

entered.detail: painted green surface with yellow taxiway markings and blue taxiway lights
modern white airport terminal complex with multiple gates and jet bridges
tall red and white striped air traffic control tower behind the terminal
commercial airliner with red tail parked near the terminal gates
urban high-rise buildings visible on the horizon beyond the airfield
snow-capped mountains visible in the far distance behind the city

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady forward movement along a green painted airport taxiway. The terminal buildings and control tower are visible ahead on the right, with a parked airliner and distant city skyline against a partly cloudy sky. The environment is open and exposed with no other traffic present.

scene_state.functional_zone: main runway intersection with taxiway signage

events.description: begins turning left from green taxiway onto the main asphalt runway surface
passes the red and yellow runway sign marked 'A 26 H' on the left side

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the main runway and continuing toward the terminal area

entered.detail: rectangular red sign with yellow text reading 'A 26 H' indicating runway intersection
wide gray asphalt surface with yellow runway markings replacing the green taxiway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left from the green taxiway onto the main asphalt runway, passing a red runway sign marked 'A 26 H'. The terminal buildings and parked airliner become more prominent as the distance closes, while the green taxiway surface exits the frame behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport tarmac approaching terminal gates

events.description: passes blue ground service equipment near the parked airliner

agents.ego_description: continuing across the open tarmac toward the terminal building and parked aircraft

entered.detail: blue baggage carts or ground service vehicles parked near the airliner

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows movement across the open asphalt tarmac toward the terminal complex. The runway sign is left behind as the camera approaches the parked airliner and terminal buildings, which now dominate the right side of the frame. Blue ground service equipment is visible near the aircraft.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a designated taxiway onto a wide asphalt runway, gradually closing the distance to a busy airport terminal. It begins with a steady glide along a green painted taxiway, with the control tower and a distant city skyline visible under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera turns left, the green surface disappears from view and is replaced by the dark asphalt of the main runway, passing a red sign marked A 26 H. The scene then expands across the open tarmac as the terminal buildings and a parked airliner grow more prominent on the right. Finally, the camera approaches the aircraft and terminal complex, revealing blue ground service equipment stationed nearby.
